positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric illustration of an abstracted celestial landscape. The main subject is a trio of interlocking moons and a crescent comet trail, rendered in clean, bold lines and solid, jewel-toned colors (sapphire, emerald, deep amethyst). The style should be a blend of Art Deco symmetry and modern minimalist folk art, creating high contrast silhouettes against a negative space background. Perfect for a central chest print on apparel. The composition must be balanced, utilizing negative space effectively. Vector art quality, clean edges, highly detailed ornamental filigree work, symmetrical composition, flat design, digital illustration, vibrant color palette, isolated on white.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, gradient, blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, signatures, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grain, low quality, disfigured, cropped
